summary: The diff implements a text overlay approach in the SCLCLogo React component to display 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' over the original image, rather than replacing the actual image file. The core requirement of generating a new version of the PNG image with corrected text is not fulfilled — the underlying image asset (sclc-logo-v2.dim_400x400.png) remains unchanged. The overlay approach partially addresses some acceptance criteria but violates the constraint that 'Only the spelling inside the logo image must change' and the non-goal of 'Changing the tagline text rendered via the SCLCLogo React component overlay'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a new version of the uploaded logo image (sclc-logo-v2.dim_400x400.png) where the text 'Ek Nayi Umheed' is corrected to 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' in the image itself
missing_requirements.reason: No new image file was added or replaced. The diff shows no changes to the PNG asset. The fix is implemented as a React overlay on top of the existing uncorrected image, which means the image file still contains 'Umheed'. The BuildRequest explicitly states the image itself should be edited, and the non-goals explicitly say 'Changing the tagline text rendered via the SCLCLogo React component overlay' is out of scope — yet that is exactly what was done.

hallucinated_features.description: A React text overlay with a styled pill/background is added to the SCLCLogo component to cover the original 'Ek Nayi Umheed' text in the image
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists 'Changing the tagline text rendered via the SCLCLogo React component overlay' as a non-goal, and the constraint states 'Only the spelling inside the logo image must change — no other design or layout modifications'. The overlay adds new visual elements (a pill-shaped background, overlay text) that were not requested and are explicitly excluded.
